Hey! How can I help you today? If you’re working on something in VS Code or need help with coding, debugging, or setting up a project, just let me know what you’re trying to do.I can read media/screenshots/README.txt. Do you want me to:
- display the full contents, or
- summarize the key points?

Let me know your preference and I’ll proceed.I can summarize it, but I don’t have the file contents in this chat yet. Please either:
- allow me to open media/screenshots/README.txt, or
- paste its contents here.

Once I have the text, I’ll give you a concise summary.
